title: Astracantha yueksekovae
taxonomy: Astracantha yueksekovae is classified in the plant kingdom as a species of Astracantha, which is a genus of flowering plants in the pea family Fabaceae. More specifically, Astracantha yueksekovae is a species within the subgenus Cytisopsis. This classification reflects Astracantha yueksekovae's close relationship to other plants in the Fabaceae family, such as the common pea. Astracantha yueksekovae's classification is used to identify and distinguish it from other species within the Astracantha genus. The precise classification of Astracantha yueksekovae provides valuable information for botanists and researchers.

intro: Astracantha yueksekovae, also known as Yueksekov's milk-vetch, is a species of legume in the pea family. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce stress and improve overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Astracantha yueksekovae include flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
